name: Graco 6" Dual-Comfort Baby Crib and Toddler Mattress
description:
The Graco 6 Inch Dual-Comfort Baby Crib and Toddler Mattress was designed to grow with your baby. Graco’s fully-expanded, dual-sided crib & toddler mattress has 2 unique sides – one for infants, the other for toddlers. Meeting the highest standards for your baby, this mattress is GREENGUARD Gold Certified, formaldehyde free, fiberglass free, free of chemical flame retardants, Certified by UL, JPMA Certified, and has a CertiPUR-US Certified foam core. Proud recipient of the 2023 Top Product Award by Parent Tested Parent Approved (PTPA), the PTPA Seal of Approval, the 2020-2023 Women’s Choice Award for “9 out of 10 Customer Recommended Crib & Toddler Mattress”.

Features include a dual-sided mattress to grow with your baby and a removable, comfortably soft mattress cover with a waterproof sleep surface. For easier care, this zip-off mattress cover is machine-washable (machine wash in cold water on delicate cycle, hang to dry – do not place in dryer machine). Designed to fit any standard full-size crib or toddler bed. Dimensions: Length (52.00 inches) x Width (28.00 inches) x Height (6 inches); Weight (12 pounds). Mattress core (100% polyurethane foam). Mattress cover (100% polyester). Backed by a 10-year limited manufacturer’s warranty. Exclusively manufactured by Stork Craft Manufacturing (USA) Inc.
